name: Metformin acute illness and renal-risk screen
risk: AKI, dehydration, hypoperfusion, hypoxia, or severe renal impairment can increase metformin accumulation and lactic-acidosis concern.
safety_action: Flag metformin for temporary hold/review during significant acute illness, AKI, dehydration, hypoperfusion, hypoxia, or when renal function is below the applicable product/local threshold.
urgency_changers: Worsening acidosis, shock, hypoxia, severe AKI, altered mental status, or rising lactate.
pharmacist_traps: Do not treat this as a routine chronic dose-adjustment question during active AKI or hypoperfusion.
